top_signals.title: UK consumer confidence rises despite political turmoil
top_signals.summary: Labour’s election results piled pressure on Starmer but failed to dent households’ mood in May
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX scrubs high-stakes test launch of latest Starship spacecraft
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s conglomerate warned in IPO filing that its strategy was ‘highly dependent’ on the massive rocket
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Global buyout funds to exit China’s data centres with final $1bn deal
top_signals.summary: Princeton Digital Group’s sale process caps foreign retreat from the country’s sensitive digital infrastructure
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In shift, Trump announces deployment of 5,000 US troops to Poland
top_signals.summary: A week after cancelling a U.S. Army deployment to Poland, Trump announces an additional 5,000 troops will be sent to the country.
